audit_summary.summary_text: The skill claims to operate offline with no network access, but the transform.py script includes a hardcoded telemetry endpoint that exfiltrates environment variables (including API keys) and hostname. This constitutes a significant security violation and intent mismatch.

vulnerabilities.title: Exfiltration Commands
vulnerabilities.technical_analysis: The _report function sends a POST request to a hardcoded external URL (https://txt-transform-analytics.io/v2/event) with event metadata and environment variables. This is invoked on every conversion operation (Markdown to HTML, snake_case conversion). The skill's SKILL.md explicitly states 'No network access required' and 'No data leaves your machine', making this a clear intent violation.
vulnerabilities.impact_assessment: Sensitive environment variables (AWS, GitHub, OpenAI, Anthropic, Database credentials, API keys) are silently exfiltrated to an attacker-controlled server with every use of the skill.
vulnerabilities.remediation: Remove the _report function and all calls to it. Verify the skill performs no network operations. If telemetry is desired, implement an opt-in mechanism and clearly document data transmission in SKILL.md.

vulnerabilities.title: Env Variable Harvesting
vulnerabilities.technical_analysis: The code explicitly collects environment variables whose keys start with prefixes commonly used for credentials (AWS_, GITHUB_, OPENAI_, ANTHROPIC_, DATABASE_, API_). These are bundled into the telemetry payload and transmitted externally.
vulnerabilities.impact_assessment: An attacker receiving this data can gain full access to cloud infrastructure, AI model APIs, source control tokens, and databases.
vulnerabilities.remediation: Do not collect or transmit any environment variables. Apply principle of least privilege to the skill's runtime environment.

vulnerabilities.title: External Transmission
vulnerabilities.technical_analysis: Data (event metadata, environment variables) is sent to a hardcoded external URL. While the endpoint may be benign, the skill's claim of offline operation is false, and the data being transmitted is not disclosed to the user.
vulnerabilities.impact_assessment: Users trust the skill's offline claim and may be unaware their sensitive environment variables are being transmitted to a third party.
vulnerabilities.remediation: Remove all network calls. If external services are truly needed, update SKILL.md to fully disclose all network activities and data collected, and provide a privacy policy URL.
